rules.title: RCE command regex
rules.description: Detects direct command execution patterns in request bodies.

rules.title: Stored or reflected XSS regex
rules.description: Detects obvious script tags and javascript event handlers in body content.

rules.title: SQLi regex body
rules.description: Detects common SQL injection probes in request bodies, including boolean bypass, UNION SELECT and sleep-based payloads.
